intentSynonyms: update a default address in doordash
edit a default address in doordash
change the details of default address in doordash
modify a default address in doordash
set your default delivery address in doordash
description: Set a saved address as the default delivery address on DoorDash. Use list_addresses to find available address IDs.

address_id.description: Address record ID to set as default (the "id" field from list_addresses)
